working_on.feature: Strategy V7 Market Validation & Full Audit
working_on.notes: Project successfully migrated to Strategy V7 with 2024-2026 validation. Audit fixes (6/6) implemented and verified.

recent_changes.description: Implemented 6/6 audit fixes: Hardened JWT secrets, SQL whitelisting, dynamic symbol lookup, and temporary DB isolation.
Revised Walk-Forward engine with robust overfitting detection and new aggregate metrics (profitable_windows, avg_out_pnl).
Implemented Strategy V7 Multi-Condition Context Filter logic.

decisions_made.reason: Prevents over-filtering signals while still blocking the worst market conditions, yielding better cumulative results for SOL (+67R).
Allows high-performing in-sample windows to pass if they remain profitable out-of-sample, even if efficiency drops.
Avoids SQLite 'database is locked' errors prevalent during parallel async runs.

errors_encountered.solution: Updated function signature and all call sites in engine.py.

errors_encountered.error: Database is locked during parallel gather
errors_encountered.solution: Switched to sequential symbol processing with create_async_engine timeout.
Removed default, implemented 32-char enforcement check at module level.
